settings.content: 10 Festival Jewellery Design Ideas for Diwali

The festival of light and illumination is here. With this luminous festival comes prosperity, joy and blessings. Starting from dhanteras to bhai dooj, this five day festival is perfect to make investments and gifting in luxury. This Diwali, make it grander with diamond jewellery that lasts a lifetime and passed down generations to become family heirlooms. 

We have curated this blog for you, whether you are looking for gifts or jewellery designs to get your customized  jewelry for Diwali 2025.

rich_text_eqncEm.name: 1. Half Bezel Set Tenz Hexa Cut Solitaire Pendant Necklace

settings.content: 1. Half Bezel Set Tenz Hexa Cut Solitaire Pendant Necklace

settings.text: This uniquely cut jewellery design is the kind of diamond jewellery that is crafted to make a bold yet refined statement with elegance. The half bezel set tenz hexa cut diamond pendant necklace blends geometric charm with minimalist sophistication. It’s an ideal piece that looks splendid with sarees or contemporary diwali outfits.

rich_text_P38YEc.name: 2. Split Trillion Cut Diamond Men's Stud

settings.content: 2. Split Trillion Cut Diamond Men's Stud

settings.text: Festive jewelry isn’t just for women! A pair of men’s diamond studs add an edge and make a sharp statement. These triangular shaped diamond earrings for men look unique, eye-catching, masculine and sophisticated! Buy diamond earrings if you are looking for a perfect accessory for men to style outfits more aesthetically and smartly! Whether you are looking for a bhaidooj present or are simply looking for a gift for him, these diamond studs look spectacular for any occasion!

rich_text_k8rM9p.name: 3. Half Bezel Set Trillion Cut Solitaire Pendant Necklace

settings.content: 3. Half Bezel Set Trillion Cut Solitaire Pendant Necklace

settings.text: Make your loved ones feel special this Diwali with a simple yet elegant gold jewellery. Check out this half bezel set trillion cut solitaire pendant necklace! The diamond stays secure due to the bezel setting and the triangular cut looks chic, offering versatility for grand occasions as well as daily wear. With excellent craftsmanship, this diamond pendant is carefully detailed and redefines luxury jewellery.

rich_text_WwwDkR.name: 4. Pear & Marquise Cut Diamond Cuff Bracelet

settings.content: 4. Pear & Marquise Cut Diamond Cuff Bracelet

settings.text: If you prefer a classy bracelet over traditional bangles, have a look at this charming pear and marquise cut diamond cuff bracelet. This sleek design envelopes the wrist with elegance and adds grace to every gesture! This cuff bracelet will not just stay reserved for Diwali, but will quickly become your go-to accessory for all occasions - big and small.

rich_text_ghYUpi.name: 5. Marquise Cut Engagement Ring with Halo Setting

settings.content: 5. Marquise Cut Engagement Ring with Halo Setting

settings.text: Dhanteras is the perfect time to gift your wife with another ring! Our diamond ring designs radiate shine and timelessness, just like your bond. This marquise cut engagement ring with a halo setting featuring 39 lab grown diamonds is perfectly set to symbolize love and elegance. The elongated shape gives an enhanced look, and looks particularly stunning on slender fingers or when you want to create a look of a bigger diamond! The halo setting adds pop, and highlights the gemstone’s brilliance.

rich_text_ynnA3U.name: 6. Marquise Diamond Crossover Micro Pave Engagement Ring

settings.content: 6. Marquise Diamond Crossover Micro Pave Engagement Ring

settings.text: If your big day is just around the corner, this marquise cut diamond crossover micro pave engagement ring is the perfect blend of eccentricity and sophistication. This bridal jewellery piece adds a dazzling brilliance to the finger, perfect for festive glow! For those who love contemporary designs, this engagement ring proves to be a statement piece offering effortless charm.

Diwali is an auspicious time to buy wedding jewellery, showing a symbol of prosperity for couples starting their married life together. This 0.60 carat round diamond ring combines multiple classic round cut diamonds to form a unique design, offering a timeless appeal and exceptional brilliance, perfect to mark special occasions and to celebrate love and togetherness.

rich_text_ihmMfF.name: 8. Elegant emerald cut diamond drop earring

settings.content: 8. Elegant emerald cut diamond drop earring

settings.text: If you are looking for a truly unique earrings gold that blend timeless design with contemporary craftsmanship, these are the earrings you are looking for! This earrings design offers versatility whether you are dressing up for the Diwali puja, walking into a boardroom meeting or heading out for cafe hopping. These stunning drop earrings feature clean lines and step-cut facets offering more sparkle.

settings.content: If you are looking for daily wear gold earrings that exude timelessness and sparkle that would last a lifetime, these emerald cut diamond drop earrings are the best choice!

settings.text: This diamond necklace is the epitome of brilliance with its finely crafted solitaire pendant, meant to reflect light like no other. This elegant round soliaire pendant is meticulously designed with a unique twist, adding appeal and enhancing the beauty of the solitaire diamond. The modern flair added to its classic design makes it effortlessly charming, perfect to be added to your festive wardrobe.

Bring your dreams to life with this whimsical pear diamond ring, an extraordinary piece with twists and turns that amount to pure beauty. This teardrop-shaped diamond ring is an excellent choice for you if you are looking for something novel, brilliant, and universally beautiful that pairs well with all kinds of outfits.

settings.content:
Conclusion

No outfit is truly complete without jewelry, and with fine jewelry, you can effortlessly create a refined look that turns heads and draws compliments wherever you go. Diamond jewelry has an undeniable allure, making you want to wear it every day as it enhances your confidence, beauty, and elegance like never before.

This Diwali, with our handpicked collection of gold and platinum diamond jewellery, it’s your moment to invest in treasures that celebrate the season’s spirit. Diwali is more than lights and festivities; it is about new beginnings, prosperity, and honoring timeless traditions.

When you choose Lucira Jewelry, you choose exceptional craftsmanship, exclusive designs, and a luxurious experience worthy of your milestones. With complete transparency in our processes and pricing, we deliver brilliance you can trust, making your celebrations even grander. Illuminate your festivities with jewellery that reflects your style, your story, and your elegance. Personalize each piece with initials, birth dates, or heartfelt messages, turning it into a keepsake that is more than an accessory; it is a part of you.
